name: petchain-load-testing
description: Load testing and performance optimization for PetChain

scripts.test:load: npm run build && k6 run dist/tests/load-test.js
scripts.test:stress: npm run build && k6 run dist/tests/stress-test.js
scripts.test:spike: npm run build && k6 run dist/tests/spike-test.js
scripts.test:soak: npm run build && k6 run dist/tests/soak-test.js
scripts.test:api: npm run build && k6 run dist/tests/api-endpoints-test.js
scripts.test:auth: npm run build && k6 run dist/tests/auth-flow-test.js
scripts.test:pets: npm run build && k6 run dist/tests/pets-workflow-test.js
scripts.test:database: npm run build && k6 run dist/tests/database-test.js
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && k6 run dist/tests/integration-test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run build && npm run test:load && npm run test:stress && npm run test:api
